---
name: Session frame
about: One issue per session — frame before you start
title: "session: <one-line goal>"
labels: ["session"]
---

## Goal
What does done look like for this session?

## Out of scope
What am I explicitly *not* doing today? (List the tempting tangents.)

## Failure condition
What would make this session a failure?

## Exit artifact
What will exist when this session closes? (Tests + tag + repo memory update is the default.)

## Estimated session length
- [ ] 60 min
- [ ] 90 min
- [ ] 120 min

---

> Close criteria: green tests · FF-merge + tag · repo memory updated · one-paragraph summary on the PR.
> If the session ends without those, mark it `drift` and note why.
